title: Epsilon pipeline
author: MORABITO, Christian
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The epsilon pipeline is a  fully automated DNA extraction pipeline  for stool and saliva samples in the context of  gut and oral microbiome science . Everything you need to know about this pipeline, will it work for me, how to install it, etc. is available on the wiki of the official repository: https://forge.inrae.fr/metagenopolis/epsilon-pipeline/ so please, make sure to go there!
steps_raw: The epsilon pipeline is a  fully automated DNA extraction pipeline  for stool and saliva samples in the context of  gut and oral microbiome science . Everything you need to know about this pipeline, will it work for me, how to install it, etc. is available on the wiki of the official repository: https://forge.inrae.fr/metagenopolis/epsilon-pipeline/ so please, make sure to go there!
